locations.name: Amazon Rainforest
locations.description: The Amazon Rainforest is the largest tropical rainforest in the world, known for its biodiversity.

locations.name: Great Barrier Reef
locations.description: The Great Barrier Reef is the world's largest coral reef system, home to a diverse range of marine life.

locations.name: Sahara Desert
locations.description: The Sahara Desert is the largest hot desert in the world, known for its extreme conditions.

locations.name: Mount Everest
locations.description: Mount Everest is the highest mountain in the world, attracting climbers from around the globe.
